projects.name: Undergraduate Thesis: Dynamic Analysis of Rooppur Nuclear Power Plant
projects.summary: Developed a Finite Element model of the cooling tower in ABAQUS. Modelled shell structures as Continuum and Conventional shell elements. Conducted non-linear time history analysis under earthquake and wind loading.
highlights: Compared simplified vs heterogeneous column modelling approaches
Applied wind loading using the Greiner equation via ABAQUS Analytical Field
